results.name: gond
results.description: The legendary hero of Safehold Taldwen.

results.name: gorge
results.description: A long, deep furrow in the earth, typically with steep walls, possibly a stream.

results.name: g'raha tia
results.description: Character in Final Fantasy XIV that also took the guise of "the crystal exarch"

results.name: gran pulse
results.description: Also known as Pulse, Gran Pulse is the large lower continent of the FFXIII world

results.name: grave pact
results.description: Cards that have abilities worded: "whenever creature you contol dies, each opponent sacrifices a creature."

results.name: graveyard fuel
results.description: Cards that require exiling other cards in graveyard as a cost for abilities and effects.

results.name: graveyard fuel-creature
results.description: Exiles creatures from the graveyard for value

results.name: graveyard order matters
results.description: These cards care about the order of cards in a graveyard, or rearrange them somehow. If any of these cards are in a player's deck, care must be taken to preserve the order of the graveyard.

results.name: graveyard seal
results.description: Prevent interaction with the graveyard or reanimation, or make it more difficult.

results.name: great-designer-search-3
results.description: Cards that are directly from or seemenly inspired by card designs from The Great Designer Search 3, a competition to find new magic designers.

results.name: greatest power matters
results.description: Cards that care about a player having the greatest power among creatures
